title: ReterPack
description: Cool PvP resource pack with pleasant textures, new phonk music on discs, renameable totems with custom textures, and cool sounds.
body:
A texture pack for PvP, featuring a built-in armor durability indicator when broken, reworked background plates, and the ability to rename a totem into a variety of beautiful textures using an anvil.The texture pack features pleasant textures, some items have been scaled down for better PvP performance, and almost all items have been redesigned, though most retain their vanilla style. Custom sounds for impacts, totem destruction, and many others have also been added. All discs have received new background music, several songs per disc.

The list of renames is located in the resource pack folder.
